title: Ethics and Ownership
summary: 9618 — software ethics, IP, licensing, and professional conduct.
learningObjectives: Outline open source vs proprietary software.

simpleExplanation.title: Rights, responsibilities, and code
simpleExplanation.summary: Computing professionals must respect intellectual property, user privacy, and societal impact of systems they build.
steps: Open source: share and modify freely.

sections.content: **Ethics and ownership** (7.1) links **6.1 data security** to **18.1 AI ethics**. Use **real scenarios** in evaluation.
